= uuid_v5


== Parameters

[cols="1,1,3"]
|===
| Name | Type | Description

| `ns`^*^
| `string`
| An optional namespace name or UUID. It supports the `dns`, `url`, `oid` and `x500` predefined namespaces and any valid RFC-9562 UUID. If empty, the nil UUID will be used.

|===

^*^ Optional parameter

== Examples

[,bloblang]
----
root.id = "example".uuid_v5()
----

[,bloblang]
----
root.id = "example".uuid_v5("x500")
----

[,bloblang]
----
root.id = "example".uuid_v5("77f836b7-9f61-46c0-851e-9b6ca3535e69")
----
